name: velocity-and-state-reset
description: Initialize or reset block and gridpoint velocities and accumulated displacements between staged-loading phases, so reported displacements measure only the current stage.

methods.name: reset velocities
notes: Rigid blocks carry block velocity / rvelocity; deformable blocks carry gridpoint velocity.

methods.name: reset accumulated displacement
notes: Zeroing displacement does not move the mesh; it only resets the accumulator.

validation_checks: FISH: block.gridpoint.disp(gp) / block.gridpoint.vel(gp) read back zero after reset
